_comment: RECALL-90-DESIGN.md §2.2 pkt 5 — closed list of Polish legal/business document-type openers (~20 lemmas). Consumed by src/pipeline/steps/case-folded-ner.js's FP guard: an ORGANIZATION_NAME candidate from the case-folded source whose span opens with one of these words is the document's own title declaration, not an organization, and must not be created — see that file for the exact matching rule and why 'ODWOŁANIE' is deliberately NOT in this list.
